next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asks revenue from service line "operator workflow discovery sprint" since January 2026. I searched invoices for the service line (single-space match, double-space no match), read all 4 matching invoice files, filtered by issued_on >= 2026-01-01, then summed matching line_eur values. Arithmetic: 650 = only INV-0004 (2026-01-17) qualifies; 2025 invoices excluded by date.
next_step.observation: Read INV-0004 and found target line item line_eur 650 on issued_on 2026-01-17.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context) and read nested finance AGENTS before invoice reads. Used service-line (line item) totals, not invoice totals.
function.outcome_justification: All invoice files containing the target service line were identified and read. Of those, only 2026-01-17 invoice is on/after January 2026; its matching line_eur is 650, so the total since January 2026 is 650.
